title: Pause All AGV Movement From The API Screen
summary: Pause movement for all AGVs using the Pause All AGVs control in the AGVs section of the System HMI API screen.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when all AGV movement needs to be paused from the AGVs section of the API screen.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for removing an AGV from the system.
Do not use this procedure for recovering an AGV back into the system.
Do not use this procedure for resuming AGV movement.
Do not use this procedure for executing or resending AGV commands.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the System HMI API screen, locate the AGVs section, and use the Pause All AGVs control.

safety_notes: This is a fleet-wide control that pauses all AGV movement.
The source does not provide confirmation indicators or status feedback for the pause action.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the System HMI API screen
AGVs section of the API screen

access_required: Access to the System HMI API screen
system_preconditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.

visual_references.description: AGV API Controls screen showing the AGVs section and the Pause All AGVs control.
ACB API Screen showing the API interface from which AGV controls are accessed.

steps.title: Open the AGVs section of the API screen
steps.purpose: Navigate to the part of the System HMI where AGV controls are available.
steps.instruction: Open the API screen and go to the AGVs section.
steps.expected_result: The AGVs section of the API screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGVs section is open and AGV controls are available on screen.
steps.failure_condition: The API screen or AGVs section cannot be accessed or is not visible.

actions.label: Open AGVs section
actions.exact_action: Open the AGVs section of the API screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The API interface used to control the OptiSweep system, AGVs, and totes.
The AGV API Controls area within the AGVs section of the API screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the API screen cannot be opened.
Stop or escalate if the AGVs section is not accessible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Users press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen. From this ACB API interface, the OptiSweep system, AGVs, and totes can be controlled.
Figure 4-12, titled AGV API Controls, appears in the AGVs section of the API screen.

steps.title: Locate the Pause All AGVs control
steps.purpose: Identify the specific fleet-wide pause control before using it.
steps.instruction: In the AGVs section, locate the control labeled Pause All AGVs.
steps.expected_result: The Pause All AGVs control is identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The Pause All AGVs control is visible and distinguishable from other AGV controls.
steps.failure_condition: The Pause All AGVs control cannot be found in the AGVs section.

actions.label: Find Pause All AGVs
actions.exact_action: Locate the Pause All AGVs control.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Pause All AGVs control among the AGV API Controls.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Pause All AGVs control is not present on the AGVs section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The AGV API Controls include Pause All AGVs, Resume All AGVs, Remove AGV, Recover AGV, Execute AGV Command, and Resend Geek Command.

steps.title: Pause all AGV movement
steps.purpose: Use the fleet-wide control to stop AGV movement.
steps.instruction: Use the Pause All AGVs control to pause all AGV movement.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV movement is paused after the control is used.
steps.failure_condition: AGV movement does not pause after using the control.

actions.label: Pause all AGVs
actions.exact_action: Use the Pause All AGVs control to pause all AGV movement.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Pause All AGVs control used to pause all AGV movement.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV movement does not pause after using the control.
Escalate if no confirmation or status feedback is available and AGV movement status cannot be verified from the source-supported screen information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Pause All AGVs: Pauses all AGV movement.

success_criteria: The Pause All AGVs control is used from the AGVs section of the API screen.
healthy_conditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.
The Pause All AGVs control is visible in the AGV API Controls area.
All AGV movement is paused after the control is used.
failure_conditions: The API screen cannot be accessed.
The AGVs section cannot be opened.
The Pause All AGVs control cannot be located.
AGV movement does not pause after using the control.
The source does not provide confirmation indicators or status feedback for the pause action.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if AGV movement does not pause after using the control.
Escalate if the Pause All AGVs control is unavailable or cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the operator cannot verify the result because the source does not provide confirmation indicators or status feedback.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV API Controls including the Pause All AGVs control.
The API screen used to access AGV controls.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Pause All AGVs: Pauses all AGV movement.

missing_details: The source does not provide explicit confirmation indicators or status feedback for the pause action.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production must be stopped before using this control.
The source does not specify whether lockout/tagout is required.
The source does not define a more detailed verification method for confirming that all AGV movement has paused.
